Intraday post (16/July)

Yesterday I prepared you for how to read the datas now.

PPI is out, Fed Funds say 46% for no cut in Sept, jumped from 44%.Market is ambivalent to digest it, because even the print came softer, they might find it still too high. Market needs retails sales too to prove the tendency. So i will analyse that tomorrow.

Lets focus on the trade…

Coding today’s positioning:

The net positioning is short speed, meaning liquidity is artificiall being generated below the spot to support the markets. I warned you for it, yesterday during the day in chat, watching the real-time SPX/VIX correlation.Volatility remains to be managed, vol of vol is well supplied now as expected into OpEx.

The centroid is at 6242.27, very strong pivot after 10.30AM.

Downside pivot is 6230.76; here we should start to feel the downside long gamma. 6205 is a strong support, especially during the last 1.5 hours. Vol should catch up to the downside to break through this, and from there 6180 would be magnetic. (Low probability)Upside pivot is 6263.46 (especially after 10.30AM, and ‘unbreakable’ in the powerhour)Volatility should catch up here to break through. Above this, gamma squeeze up to 6283/6300 range at max.From here price likely to gravitate back towards the 6263, or towards 6280 if it can hold 6273 into the powerhour.

I estimate that the upside max could be broken only in the first 2 hours if volatility calms down there. And above that, 6308 is the line in the sand: pin to 6310, or reject back below the ‘max’ of 6300/6283.

Market is expected to range here, because they don’t have clear trend.
